provider_approval_type: video-based training approved by the Office of the Attorney General (OAG)
enforcing_agencies: Texas Department of Licensing and Regulation
applicable_to: commercial lodging establishments with 10 or more rooms
all lodging establishments in the state, regardless of size
required_topics: identifying and responding to human trafficking in the hospitality industry

required_content: steps to identify and respond to human trafficking

harbor_alliance_actions: review and comply with the annual training requirement as per HB 390
ensure all approved training videos are utilized for employee education
risks_or_constraints: non-compliance with annual training could result in enforcement actions from state agencies
